name: @metorial/fraudlabs-pro
description: Screen online transactions for payment fraud by analyzing IP geolocation, email validity, billing/shipping details, credit card info, proxy/VPN usage, blacklists, and transaction velocity. Receive a fraud risk score to approve, review, or reject orders. Update transaction statuses with feedback (approve, reject, or reject & blacklist) to improve fraud detection accuracy. Retrieve existing transaction screening results. Send SMS-based OTP verification codes to authenticate customer identities.
